rules: Headings MUST use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter)
Overlines and small labels MUST be Uppercase, JetBrains Mono, text-xs, with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em])
Body text should use leading-relaxed for readability
NEVER center-align paragraphs; prioritize left-alignment for tech precision
NO generic full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial glows behind specific elements
Tinted Grey Rule: All grays must feel slightly cool or match the Obsidian base
Hover states MUST have explicitly higher contrast
Use Electric Cyan (#00E5FF) specifically for Market Intelligence elements and Acid Yellow (#CCFF00) for Tuning Intelligence elements to create visual product separation

layouts.hero: Asymmetric split or massive typography over dark cinematic car image. Overlay with grid lines. High padding (py-32)
layouts.features: Bento Grid Mode A: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall (col-span-4 row-span-2) and wide (col-span-8 row-span-1) items
layouts.pricing: 4-column grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with The Tracing Beam effect on the 'Combined' tier. Glassmorphism cards
layouts.general_spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 or p-12 inside cards. Section padding should be py-24 or py-32

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-[#111111]), 1px subtle border (border-white/10). On hover: border color darkens/lightens, slight translate-y
surfaces.glass: Crystal Glass for Nav: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10
surfaces.tech_borders: Use 'Grid Borders' look for How it Works section. Items have border-r and border-b of border-white/10

motion.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-up and slight scale-in for bento grid items using framer-motion
motion.interactions: Buttons get scale down on tap (active:scale-95), borders glow on hover
rules: Transitions should target specific properties, NEVER 'all'

components_to_use.name: Navigation
components_to_use.style: Sticky Crystal Glass header, Logo left, links center, CTAs right

components_to_use.name: Button
components_to_use.style: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md). Primary is Acid Yellow. Secondary is Outline with backdrop-blur.

components_to_use.name: BentoCard
components_to_use.style: Custom div with border-white/10, bg-surface, inner padding p-8. Use for Feature sections.

components_to_use.name: PricingCard
components_to_use.style: Dark mode SaaSFrame pattern. 3-4 tiers. Feature lists with Lucide 'Check' icons. Elite/Combined tier uses Tracing Beam.

components_to_use.name: Accordion
components_to_use.style: Shadcn accordion for FAQs. Flush left, 1px bottom border per item, monospace numbers.

images.description: Black BMW car with headlights on at night. Use as a large, darkened background for the Hero section with an opacity overlay.
Graphs of performance analytics. Use inside a bento grid card for Market Intelligence.
Abstract glitch art digital code. Use as a background texture for a Market Intelligence bento card.
Detailed view of an exposed car engine. Use for Tuning Intelligence ECU/TCU support bento card.
Mechanic tuning up engine parts. Use for Technical Knowledge Centralization bento card.
Auto mechanic with toolbox standing confidently. Use as a testimonial avatar.
Portrait of a skilled mechanic holding a lug wrench. Use as a testimonial avatar.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle SVG noise overlay fixed over the entire screen with pointer-events-none and 3% opacity. Gives a matte, physical feel.
visual_enhancers.effects: Use blurred colored circles (Electric Cyan and Acid Yellow) behind feature grids for a subtle glowing ambient light.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over dark backgrounds maintains WCAG AA standard.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-demo').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the landing page in /app/frontend/src/App.jsx or create separate components in /app/frontend/src/components/.
Ensure the entire app is wrapped in a dark theme container with bg-[#050505] and text-white.
Do NOT use 'transition: all'. Apply specific transitions.
Do NOT center align the App container. Use left-aligned layouts mostly.
Use Framer Motion for scroll animations (initial={opacity: 0, y: 20} whileInView={opacity: 1, y: 0}).
Section 1: Hero - Use the car image as background, heavy dark gradient overlay so text is readable.
Section 2 & 3: Market & Tuning Features - Build two separate Bento Grid sections. Use Electric Cyan for Market, Acid Yellow for Tuning accents.
Section 4: How It Works - Use a grid layout with visible borders to create a 'technical blueprint' look.
Section 5: Pricing - 4 dark mode cards. Make the 'Combined' (Market+Tuning) plan stand out with a glowing border or The Tracing Beam.
Section 6: Testimonials - Simple horizontal scrolling or flex row.
Section 8: Footer - Massive typography 'STARTEN SIE JETZT' with a newsletter input.

universal_guidelines.rule_2: Implement micro-animations on all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines.rule_3: Use layered shadows and borders (e.g. border-white/10).
universal_guidelines.rule_4: Avoid placeholder text for images; use the provided image URLs.
universal_guidelines.rule_5: Toasts should use Sonner if applicable (e.g., for form submissions).
